arguments.answer: The files listed on smbfs mounts are: $dir, backup, compress_folder1.tar, dir, dir1_sorted.txt, dir2_sorted.txt, folder1_sorted, folder2_sorted, FooBar, noise.txt, system, testbed, workspace.
